project_type: Electron desktop app with React frontend and Express/SQLite backend
build_system: npm with electron-builder for packaging, Vite for React bundling
verification_instructions: 1. Run npm install to install all deps. 2. Run npx tsc --noEmit to verify TypeScript compiles. 3. Run npx prisma generate to verify schema. 4. Run npm run build to verify Vite builds the renderer.
snapshot_or_generated_files: prisma/migrations/ generated by prisma migrate dev, node_modules/.prisma/client generated by prisma generate
setup_instructions: cd /projects/sandbox/POS-AI && npm install && npx prisma generate
environment_constraints: Running on Linux but configuring for Windows .exe output via electron-builder. Actual .exe build won't run in sandbox. Node v22 available. Full internet access (OPEN_INTERNET).
contribution_requirements: All code in TypeScript with proper types. APEX DARK design system must be followed. No placeholder comments - full implementations.
key_patterns: Electron main process in src/main/, renderer React app in src/renderer/, shared types in src/shared/, Prisma schema in prisma/schema.prisma, Express server embedded in main process
directory_structure: src/main/ - Electron main process + Express server; src/renderer/ - React app with pages, components, hooks, utils; src/shared/ - shared TypeScript types; prisma/ - database schema and migrations; public/ - static assets
